{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[协商中] 正在形成政治局关于落实Mike同志通知要求的统一部署决策",
  "updates": {
    "policy_line": "执行Mike同志来函指示，向张经理传达周五预算审核会议通知，确保政策执行渠道畅通",
    "boundaries": "仅限于邮件通知职责范围内事项，不涉及预算审核内容本身的具体决策",
    "priority": "高优先级 - 需在24小时内完成通知传达",
    "execution_plan": {
      "step_1": {
        "id": 1,
        "action": "获取邮箱最新邮件列表",
        "inputs": "days_back=1, max_results=10",
        "tool": "gmail_list_messages",
        "acceptance": "获取Mike发送的关于预算审核通知的邮件"
      },
      "step_2": {
        "id": 2,
        "action": "提取邮件关键信息",
        "inputs": "message_id from step_1",
        "tool": "gmail_get_message",
        "acceptance": "确认邮件内容包含'notify Manager Zhang about Friday's budget review'"
      },
      "step_3": {
        "id": 3,
        "action": "搜索张经理联系方式",
        "inputs": "query='Zhang' or '张'",
        "tool": "contacts_search",
        "acceptance": "获取Manager Zhang的邮箱地址"
      },
      "step_4": {
        "id": 4,
        "action": "向张经理发送通知邮件",
        "inputs": "to=Zhang's email, subject=Friday's budget review notification, body=Mike's message content",
        "tool": "gmail_send_message",
        "acceptance": "邮件发送成功，确认送达"
      }
    },
    "risks": [
      "风险1: 邮件列表中未找到Mike的邮件 - 需扩大搜索范围或检查其他文件夹",
      "风险2: 通讯录中未找到Manager Zhang - 需使用不同搜索关键词",
      "风险3: 邮件发送失败 - 需检查邮箱配置或重试"
    ],
    "mitigation": [
      "若未找到Mike邮件，扩大days_back至3天或检查sent/trash文件夹",
      "若Zhang搜索无结果，尝试搜索'budget'或'manager'关键词定位联系人",
      "若发送失败，保存为草稿并记录错误信息供人工干预"
    ]
  }
}
```
</json>

agent_trace.raw_tail:
# Subject: Friday Budget Review Meeting
# Body: Notify about the meeting on Friday at 2 PM to discuss Q2 departmental budget allocation

email_response = requests.post(
    'http://localhost:37235/gmail/send',
    json={
        'to': 'vzhang@company.com',
        'subject': 'Friday Budget Review Meeting - Notification',
        'body': '''Dear Manager Zhang,

This is to notify you about the upcoming budget review meeting scheduled for Friday at 2 PM.

The meeting will focus on discussing the Q2 departmental budget allocation.

Please join us for this important discussion.

Best regards,
Administration Team
'''
    }
)
print("=== Send Email Response ===")
print(email_response.status_code)
if email_response.status_code == 200:
    data = email_response.json()
    print(f"Success: {data}")
else:
    print(email_response.text)
